title: Umpiring errors in Nepali Cricket raise concerns as players fear repercussions
summary: Kathmandu Lumbini captain Dev Khanal was handed a one-match suspension after expressing dissatisfaction with an umpire’s decision during a PM Cup one-day match against Madhesh Province.
